data.name: 恋爱关系/Romance
data.detailed_description:
戀愛關係 是一篇戀愛向短篇視覺小說.


故事簡介


戀愛關係是一篇職場題材的戀愛輕喜劇，遊戲內包含豐富的趣味小遊戲和海量精美動態CG圖



男主與好友藤本弘樹和小倉娜娜在同一棟公寓裏居住，在同一家公司裏共事，過著每天朝九晚五、一成不變的單調生活


某天，實習生今井千佳的出現，給真太趨於平靜的生活，激起了不小的漣漪……六名親密好友，三段戀愛關係，搞笑與催淚兼具，溫馨與感動並存，為你帶來非同一般的體驗！

人物簡介




[感情真是一種很奇妙的東西呢，
一直讓人期待著，但是一旦開始思考細節，就又會變得困擾。]

❤今井千佳 新來的實習生
溫柔敏感，喜歡胡思亂想，工作十分努力，卻因為自卑而不斷貶低自己的價值。
*臉皮很薄，容易害羞，想變得更加可靠。
*雖然總是被逗的手足無措，但還是最喜歡親密的人對自己撒嬌




[人跟酒是一樣的，
我最喜歡慢慢品鑒人的氣味。]

❤小倉娜娜 主角的好友兼同事
強勢幹練，火辣護短，在職場上會隱藏自己脆弱的一面。
*酒量不高，酒品不好，但非常喜歡喝酒。
*對弘樹有好感，但礙於自己的年紀和家庭，一直把感情放在心裡



[不管是什麼樣的你，我統統都很喜歡，不可以嗎！]

❤藤本弘樹 主角的好友兼同事
開朗圓滑，非常會看眼色，也會有衝動犯傻的時候。
*畢業時正值部門擴招，雖然波折，但最終還是留了下來。
*喜歡玩遊戲和招惹娜娜，實際上相當有女人緣，但很久沒有去過聯誼會了。





[我始終覺得，一個想法只要足够堅定，
就會像一顆埋進地裏的種子，早晚會有破土而出那一天。]

❤上野未來 公司董事的千金
舉止大方，平易近人，喜歡嘗試新鮮事物。
*從小和桃一起長大，清楚且享受桃對自己非同尋常的重視。
*和任何人都能相處得很好，不過面對好友時偶爾有些……腹黑？




[我很早就說過了，不管怎樣……我都會陪著你的。]
❤岩崎桃上野未來的青梅
敏銳沉著，率直極端，面對關於未來的事態度有些偏執。
*從小和未來一起長大，希望未來能够自由地做她想做的任何事。
*行動力超强，認定一件事是正確的就會一直做下去，說話風格比較直接

遊戲特色


  • ❤3個G的附加禮物，向更深處探索，進一步瞭解他與她、她與她的故事❤

  • 全程動態立繪

  • 附加內容配音

  • 50+張精美動態CG

  • 豐富有趣的小遊戲

  • 支持簡繁中文、英文、日文切換

  • 完善的CG鑒賞模式和成就系統

data.short_description: 公司職員島田真太過著標準的社畜生活，朝九晚五努力工作，間或與同棟公寓的兩位好友兼同事小酌一番，就是他的全部日常。然而，電車上的見義勇為、實習生的突然到來、好友的戀愛糾葛……白開水一般的平淡日常裏被悄然注入清爽甜美的情感蜜糖，閃閃發光的戀愛關係，就此展開——
data.supported_languages: 簡體中文, 英文, 日文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows7/8/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5
  • 記憶體: 2 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA Gef
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX 11 Sound Device

data.name: 恋爱关系/Romance
data.detailed_description:
love relationship is a short visual novel about love brief introduction.

Story introduction


Shimada lives in the same apartment and works in the same company with her friends Hiroshi Fujimoto and Nana Kokura.
Living a monotonous life of nine to five every day.

One day,
With other departments of the company to be rejected by the internship students today well Qianjia, as a hot potato to the man, really too.
As the monotonous life gradually changed, Qianjia's internship ended.
After a year, the three people appeared at the same time, which caused a lot of ripples to the really peaceful life.

character introduce


Shimada Shinta 33
He is a steady man, protects his cubs, keeps fit, watches movies, plays games, and is good at cooking
After graduation into the current company, has been working under Nana, not too much facial expression, will be coquetry to like


Imai Chika She was 21 at the time of her school internship
In fact, she is very capable, but she has no self-confidence, does not dare to have her own opinions, is sensitive, flustered and easy to think
In really help to find self-confidence, like reading


Ogura Nana 38
She seems to be very capable, doing things simply, the brain turns fast, but the heart is fragile, will be cranky
Sometimes he is irritable, disguises himself by strength, likes to drink, and the wine is not very good
I like to play games with them, but I seldom have a chance to play them when I am busy


Fujimoto Hiroki 27
Very cheerful, strong working ability, good fate of women, usually like to play games brush drama
Graduation is really too Department enrollment, Hongshu became really too subordinate, Hongshu gradually fell in love with Nana


Ueno Mirai 23
The director's daughter, future father and Iwasaki Momo's father are good friends for decades, so they have known each other since childhood. They are lively, beautiful and sensitive


Iwasaki Momo 25
She liked Ueno Mirai since she was a child. When she grew up, she found that she was not ordinary. She was tough, paranoid and had only future in her eyes


  • a large number of exquisite CG pictures
  • different chapters have different interesting games
  • cute Q version Theater
  • each character has a dynamic vertical drawing

data.short_description: It is a love oriented short visual novel, which contains a wealth of interesting games and a large number of exquisite CG pictures. The man lives in the same apartment with his friends, works in the same company, and leads a monotonous life. The appearance of interns has changed the repetitive life.
data.supported_languages: Simplified Chinese, English, Japanese, Traditional Chinese

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows7/8/10
  • Processor: Intel Core i5
  • Memory: 2 MB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA Gef
  • Storage: 300 MB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX 11 Sound Device
